```














{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "tests/test_integration.py",
  "3:VARINT": 3,
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:VARINT": 3,
    "2:LEN": "tests/test_integration.py",
    "3:LEN": {
      "1:VARINT": 251,
      "2:VARINT": 1909,
      "3:VARINT": 1658,
      "4:LEN": "        [\r\n            sys.executable,\r\n            \"-m\",\r\n            \"netprof.cli.main\",\r\n            \"fixtures\",\r\n            \"generate\",\r\n            \"--output\",\r\n            str(out_dir),\r\n        ],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_netprof_analyze(pcap_path: Path, out_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n    subprocess.run(\r\n        [\r\n            sys.executable,\r\n            \"-m\",\r\n            \"netprof.cli.main\",\r\n            \"analyze\",\r\n            str(pcap_path),\r\n            \"--out\",\r\n            str(out_dir),\r\n        ],\r\n        check=True,\r\n        capture_output=True,\r\n        cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED(\r\n    not Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.joinpath(\"netprof\").exists(),\r\n    reason=\"netprof package not installed\",\r\n)\r\ndef test_analyze_fixtures_integration(tmp_path: Path):\r\n    \"\"\"Generate fixtures, run analyze, assert summary and transactions counts.\"\"\"\r\n    fixtures_dir = tmp_path / \"fixtures\"\r\n    out_dir = tmp_path / \"out\"\r\n    _run_netprof_fixtures_generate(fixtures_dir)\r\n    http1_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http1_keepalive.pcap\"\r\n    http2_pcap = fixtures_dir / \"http2_minimal.pcap\"\r\n    assert http1_pcap.exists(), \"http1_keepalive.pcap should exist\"\r\n    assert http2_pcap.exists(), \"http2_minimal.pcap should exist\"\r\n    _run_netprof_analyze(fixtures_dir, out_dir)\r\n    summary_path = out_dir / \"summary.json\"\r\n    assert summary_path.exists(), f\"summary.json not found in {out_dir}\"\r\n    with open(summary_path, encoding=\"utf-8\") as REDACTED        summary = json.load(f)\r\n    assert summary[\"total_flows\"] == 2, (\r\n        f\"expected 2 flows, got {summary['total_flows']}; summary={summary}\"\r\n    )\r\n    assert summary[\"total_transactions\"] >= 2, (\r\n        f\"expected >=2 transactions, got {summary['total_transactions']}\"\r\n    )\r\n"
    },
    "4:VARINT": 2662
  }
}
```

2B%2B%2B%2Bnot%2BPath%28__file__%29.resolve%28%29.parent.parent.joinpath%28%5C%22netprof%5C%22%29.exists%28%29%2C%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Breason%3D%5C%22netprof%2Bpackage%2Bnot%2Binstalled%5C%22%2C%5Cr%5Cn%29%5Cr%5Cndef%2Btest_analyze_fixtures_integration%28tmp_path%3A%2BPath%29%3A%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22Generate%2Bfixtures%2C%2Brun%2Banalyze%2C%2Bassert%2Bsummary%2Band%2Btransactions%2Bcounts.%5C%22%5C%22%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%3D%2Btmp_path%2B%2F%2B%5C%22fixtures%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bout_dir%2B%3D%2Btmp_path%2B%2F%2B%5C%22out%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_fixtures_generate%28fixtures_dir%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp1_pcap%2B%3D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22http1_keepalive.pcap%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhttp2_pcap%2B%3D%2Bfixtures_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22http2_minimal.pcap%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp1_pcap.exists%28%29%2C%2B%5C%22http1_keepalive.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhttp2_pcap.exists%28%29%2C%2B%5C%22http2_minimal.pcap%2Bshould%2Bexist%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B_run_netprof_analyze%28fixtures_dir%2C%2Bout_dir%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary_path%2B%3D%2Bout_dir%2B%2F%2B%5C%22summary.json%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary_path.exists%28%29%2C%2Bf%5C%22summary.json%2Bnot%2Bfound%2Bin%2B%7Bout_dir%7D%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bwith%2Bopen%28summary_path%2C%2Bencoding%3D%5C%22utf-8%5C%22%29%2Bas%2BREDACTED%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsummary%2B%3D%2Bjson.load%28f%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%5B%5C%22total_flows%5C%22%5D%2B%3D%3D%2B2%2C%2B%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bf%5C%22expected%2B2%2Bflows%2C%2Bgot%2B%7Bsummary%5B%27total_flows%27%5D%7D%3B%2Bsummary%3D%7Bsummary%7D%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%29%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bsummary%5B%5C%22total_transactions%5C%22%5D%2B%5Cu003e%3D%2B2%2C%2B%28%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bf%5C%22expected%2B%5Cu003e%3D2%2Btransactions%2C%2Bgot%2B%7Bsummary%5B%27total_transactions%27%5D%7D%5C%22%5Cr%5Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%29%5Cr%5Cn%22%7D%2C%224%3AVARIN
